mapper.select: SELECT c.care_number, c.care_title, c.care_date, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date FROM ddd_care c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_status = 'open' AND ( u.user_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ORDER BY c.care_date ASC

SELECT l.log_number, l.log_title, l.log_content, l.log_date, u.user_nickname, li.log_img_path FROM ddd_log l JOIN ddd_user u ON l.user_number = u.user_number LEFT JOIN ddd_log_img li ON l.log_number = li.log_number AND li.log_img_number = ( SELECT MIN(li2.log_img_number) FROM ddd_log_img li2 WHERE li2.log_number = l.log_number ) WHERE l.log_number = #{log_number}

SELECT COUNT(a.apply_number) || '/' || c.care_recruit AS apply_status FROM ddd_care c LEFT JOIN ddd_care_apply a ON c.care_number = a.care_number WHERE c.care_number = #{care_number} GROUP BY c.care_recruit;
SELECT c.apply_number, u.user_number, u.user_name, u.user_nickname, u.user_phone FROM ddd_care_apply c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.care_number = #{care_number};
mapper.update: UPDATE ddd_care SET care_status = 'deleted' WHERE care_number = #{care_number}
